articles.title: 2 Hantavirus Cruise Passengers Are Texas Residents (Live Updates) - Forbes
articles.description: The MV Hondius is en route to the Canary Islands, where it will be allowed to dock for the first time since a hantavirus outbreak was confirmed on board.
articles.content: Thursday, May 7, 2026 Speaking to reporters outside at the Lincoln Memorial, Trump was asked about the Hantavirus outbreak and said: Its very much, we hope, under control...We have a lot of people, a… [+9698 chars]
